query:
SELECT s.id, s.job_id, s.scene_index, s.status, s.video_url, s.updated_at,
       j.status as job_status, j.scenes_total, j.scenes_completed
FROM music_video_scenes s
JOIN music_video_jobs j ON s.job_id = j.id
WHERE j.created_at > (NOW() - INTERVAL 2 HOUR)
ORDER BY j.created_at DESC, s.scene_index ASC
LIMIT 20;
